info: Season: 2026
Match Format: Best of 7 (first to 4 games)
Venue: Maties Table Tennis Club, Coetzenburg

divisions.name: Premier Division
info: Location: Dance Hall of the Maties Gym, Coetzenburg Road, Stellenbosch
Match Times: Fridays — Warmups from 18:15, first matches at 18:45, second round at 19:45
Match Format: Best of 7, 2 matches per night (5 tables)
League Format: Double round robin — top 4 play semifinals and finals
Entry: R250, EFT before 27 March
Prizes: Medals, R2500 to winner, R1000 to runner-up, R500 to semifinalists

Rules & Penalties:
RuleInfringementPenalty
1. Be on timeArriving 10+ minutes after scheduled match timeForfeit
2. Show up to matchesForfeit with notice & valid reasonForfeit
No-show (no notice)Forfeit + R200 fine + 2 warnings
3. Unsportsmanlike behaviourFoul language, disrespectful conduct, "throwing" matches, damaging equipmentUp to discretion: warnings, fine, forfeit or expulsion
4. Wear appropriate attireMost clothing allowed except: white shirts, distracting accessories, shoes with dark solesWill be asked to remove/replace

Additional rules:
• Matches to be played at Maties Club only
• No rescheduling/postponements allowed — only under extreme circumstances and with the approval of the coordinator
• 3 warnings = expulsion from league
• 3 forfeits (with notice) = expulsion from league
